channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Rezz Cancels Coachella Weekend 2 Performance: ‘I Continued to Push Thinking It Would Be Fine’
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "What's trending on Billboard? We've got some updates from the world of music festivals. If you're heading to weekend 2 of Coachella, you might be disappointed to hear that DJ and producer Rezz has cancelled her appearance.
[Short music transition]
Host: "Rezz took to social media to share the news, citing health issues. She explained that her body has been warning her to take a break, and she's finally listening. The DJ performed at Coachella's first weekend, but won't be making it back for the second.
[Short music transition]
Host: "Rezz didn't go into specifics about what's going on, but made it clear that her health has to come first. She's apologizing to fans who were looking forward to seeing her perform, and is promising to upload her full weekend 1 set to YouTube soon.
[Short music transition]
Host: "This isn't the end of Rezz's festival season, though. She's still set to perform at Breakaway Music Festival in Columbus, Ohio, and Tomorrowland in Flanders, Belgium. We'll be keeping an eye on her upcoming shows to see if anything changes.
[Outro music plays]
Host: "That's the latest from Coachella. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you in the next one."
